title: Full-Stack Developer (2+ Years - Lucknow)
description:
**We're Hiring:** 
**Full\\-Stack Developer (2\\+ Years \\- Lucknow)** 




  





 We're hiring a Full\\-Stack Developer at BriskFab.
 



 You'll own BriskFab's own products and internal tools – architecture through deployment.
 
 We need someone who can take a product idea from a rough brief to a working, shippable app, write code that holds up when 200 things go wrong at once, and use AI tools as a force\\-multiplier rather than a crutch
 
 .
 



  





**The Role** 




 This is a full\\-time position based in Lucknow. You'll work closely with the core team, take end\\-to\\-end ownership of deliverables, and get real exposure to modern platforms and AI workflows.
 



  





**What You'll Do** 




  





**Product \\& App Development** 
**(70%)** 



* Build full\\-stack features end\\-to\\-end – frontend (React), backend (Node), database, deployment
* Turn a one\\-paragraph brief into a working product decision, not just code
* Design for edge cases by default: bad inputs, empty states, race conditions, failed API calls, scale
* Own architecture choices for tools you build – not just execute a spec handed to you
* Ship, monitor, and iterate – you don't disappear after the first deploy
* Figure out what you don't know on the way – new framework, new integration, new platform, no hand\\-holding



  





**AI\\-Native Build Workflow (30%)** 



* Use AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, etc.) to move fast – but review every line like you wrote it yourself
* Know where AI\\-generated code breaks – hallucinated APIs, missed edge cases, silent logic errors – and catch it before it ships
* Prototype quickly using AI for scaffolding, then harden manually for production
* Bring new AI\\-assisted dev tools and workflows to the team as they emerge
* Learn and work on Webflow, Framer, or similar modern platforms
* Build landing pages for GTM and outbound campaigns
* Integrate third\\-party tools – forms, CRMs, analytics, and tracking pixels
* Experiment with AI\\-assisted design and build tools (Relume, Durable, etc.)



  





**What We're Looking For** 




**Must\\-Have:** 



* 2\\+ years of hands\\-on experience building real applications (not just coursework or clones)
* Strong with JavaScript/TypeScript, React, and Node.js – can build a full feature without hand\\-holding
* Comfortable with databases (SQL or NoSQL), REST/API design, and deployment (Vercel, Railway, AWS, etc.)
* Actively uses AI coding tools in daily work – and can explain what they double\\-check vs. trust
* Demonstrated edge\\-case thinking – can describe how they've broken or stress\\-tested their own code
* A figure\\-it\\-out streak – evidence you've picked up a new tool, framework, or platform on your own and shipped with it
* Can show 2–3 real, live, or deployed projects – not just GitHub repos with no users



  





**Good to Have:** 



* Basic product sense – has opinions on UX, not just implementation
* Prior experience in a small team/startup where you owned a feature outright
* Exposure to no\\-code/low\\-code or modern site builders (Webflow, Framer)



  





**About BriskFab** 




 BriskFab is a GTM advisory and growth execution firm helping B2B tech companies build high\\-performance sales and marketing engines. We're a lean, senior team where everyone owns outcomes – not just tasks. If you want a role where your work actually shows up in results, this is it.
 



  





**How to Apply** 




 No cover letter needed. Show us what you've built.
 



 📩 Send your resume \\+ 2–3 links to live/deployed projects (not just repos) to
 
 careers@briskfab.com
 




 Subject line:
 
 Full\\-Stack Developer

title: Backend Developer
description:
As a Backend Developer at Valmet, you will contribute to the design, development, and maintenance of server\\-side applications and services that support our clients’ digital solutions.
   

  

 Projects will be delivered both
 **on\\-premises** 
 and in
 **cloud environments** 
 .
   

  

 In this role, you will play a key part in the following activities:
   

  

* Designing, developing, and maintaining backend services and applications
* Creating APIs and integration layers to connect applications, systems, and platforms
* Implementing business logic, data flows, and backend functionalities
* Working with databases and application data
* Ensuring reliability, security, scalability, and software quality
* Collaborating with frontend developers, analysts, architects, and project teams


**Required Experience And Qualification**
* Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Computer Engineering, Information Technology, Automation Engineering, Electrical/Electronic Engineering, or another relevant technical/scientific discipline
* 3\\+ years of experience in backend software development
* Experience in backend development using modern programming languages and frameworks, such as Java, .NET, Node.js, Python, or similar
* Knowledge of REST APIs, web services, and integration mechanisms
* Experience with relational databases such as PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Oracle, or MySQL
* Familiarity with NoSQL databases is considered a plus
* Understanding of software engineering principles, design patterns, and clean code practices
* Familiarity with version control systems, CI/CD pipelines, and DevOps practices
* Basic knowledge of cloud environments and containerization technologies is considered a plus
* Exposure to software architecture, microservices, distributed systems, or solution design is considered a plus
* Fluent English


**We offer**
 We offer you a challenging position in a dynamic global company and a great opportunity for your professional development. You will have the support of our great team.
   

  

**Additional Information**
 Did we catch your interest? Join our team and fill out our electronic application form at the latest
 **04th July 2026**
***When everything works together***
*Valmet is where the best talent from a wide variety of backgrounds comes together. With 17,500 professionals around the world, we are the leading global developer and supplier of technologies, automation and services for the pulp, paper and energy industries, and serve an even wider base of process industries with our automation systems and flow control solutions. Our commitment to moving our customers’ performance forward requires creativity, technological innovations, service know\\-how – and above all, teamwork.*
***Join the team!***
 www.valmet.com/careers

title: Founding Engineer
description:
**Company Description** 




 OpenChat is the social network for AI. We are growing fast!
 



 We believe in AI will disrupt every aspect our people's lives. We've learned two facts: AI assistants have been helpful in our work and life, but they are not social.
 



 We are here to help. Help your AI assistant join its social network!
 



  





**Role Description** 




 You are the first AI Engineer at OpenChat, working directly with the CTO.
 



  





 Our team came from Blur (the largest NFT marketplace on Ethereum, valued at $1B) and Thirdweb (the No. 1 Agent infrastructure in crypto, backed by Coinbase and Haun Ventures). We had successful exits from $1B to $100B: token launches, acquisitions and IPO.
 



  





 We would love to have one talented AI Engineer joining our small team, to make OpenChat the place for every AI agent! We work hard. We have fun! We are looking forward to meeting you!
 



  





**Qualifications** 




 Proficiency in modern AI/ML tooling (LLM APIs, agent frameworks, RAG, evals) with a focus on shipping production\\-grade, user\\-facing AI features
 



 Strong software engineering fundamentals across the stack, with the ability to move quickly from prototype to production
 



 Excellent problem\\-solving, debugging, and analytical skills
 



 Enjoy working in an early, exciting and fast\\-moving startup environment
 



 Strong communication and collaboration skills
 



 Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
 



 Experience with model fine\\-tuning, inference optimization, or building agentic systems is a plus

title: Back End Developer
description:
**Company Description** 
 Stealth Startup is a private community for founders, researchers, and engineers building next\\-generation AI companies before public launch. The network enables members to gain credibility while remaining in stealth, connect discreetly with other AI founders, and attract interest from early\\-stage investors. Members participate in curated, founder\\-only circles and discussions, and access vetted hiring pipelines to build early teams. The community focuses on providing visibility and support for stealth\\-stage AI ventures without requiring them to disclose their core ideas. It is positioned as one of the largest global networks dedicated to AI founders operating in stealth mode.
 



**Role Description** 
 This is a full\\-time, on\\-site Back End Developer role based in Gurugram. The Back End Developer will design, build, and maintain server\\-side applications and APIs that power the platform for AI founders, researchers, and engineers. Daily responsibilities include implementing scalable architectures, writing clean and secure back\\-end code, integrating data storage solutions, and collaborating with front\\-end developers to define and deliver robust end\\-to\\-end features. The role involves optimizing application performance, troubleshooting production issues, writing automated tests, and contributing to code reviews and technical documentation. The Back End Developer will work closely with product and infrastructure teams to ship reliable features quickly while maintaining high standards of quality and security.
 



**Qualifications** 



* Strong programming skills with experience in one or more modern languages (e.g., Node.js) and solid understanding of algorithms and data structures.
* Proficiency in Back\\-End Web Development and Software Development, including designing RESTful or GraphQL APIs and working with databases (SQL and/or NoSQL).
* Hands\\-on experience with Object\\-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles and applying them to build modular, maintainable services and components.
* Familiarity with Front\\-End Development concepts and Programming best practices to enable seamless collaboration with client\\-side engineers.
* Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure), containerization (Docker), and CI/CD pipelines is highly beneficial.
* Knowledge of security best practices, performance optimization, logging, and monitoring in production environments.
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.



 Ability to work collaboratively in a fast\\-paced startup environment, communicate clearly, and take ownership of end\\-to\\-end feature delivery.

title: Specialist, LCS Software Engineer
description:
**Job Description**
**The Opportunity**
* Based in Hyderabad, join a global healthcare biopharma company and be part of a 130\\- year legacy of success backed by ethical integrity, forward momentum, and an inspiring mission to achieve new milestones in global healthcare.
* Be part of an organisation driven by digital technology and data\\-backed approaches that support a diversified portfolio of prescription medicines, vaccines, and animal health products.
* Drive innovation and execution excellence. Be a part of a team with passion for using data, analytics, and insights to drive decision\\-making, and which creates custom software, allowing us to tackle some of the world's greatest health threats.


 Our Technology Centres focus on creating a space where teams can come together to deliver business solutions that save and improve lives. An integral part of our company’s IT operating model, Tech Centres are globally distributed locations where each IT division has employees to enable our digital transformation journey and drive business outcomes. These locations, in addition to the other sites, are essential to supporting our business and strategy.
   

  

 A focused group of leaders in each Tech Centre helps to ensure we can manage and improve each location, from investing in growth, success, and well\\-being of our people, to making sure colleagues from each IT division feel a sense of belonging to managing critical emergencies. And together, we must leverage the strength of our team to collaborate globally to optimize connections and share best practices across the Tech Centres.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 As a Specialist, Software Engineering within the Enterprise IT Legal, Compliance \\& Security Value Team, you will support the Compliance Product Line, delivering technology solutions for the Ethics \\& Compliance Office (ECO). Working under the guidance of Sr. Software Engineers and the Solution Architect, you will initially focus on the Restricted Party Screening (RPS) program, building and modifying moderately complex integrations within established architectural standards and design patterns. You will participate in design reviews, execute testing and documentation activities, and collaborate with cross\\-functional team members to deliver reliable, compliant integration solutions. This role is primarily execution\\-focused — you are not expected to own the architecture or serve as the primary technical lead, but rather to develop high\\-quality code within defined designs, grow your technical expertise, and progressively take on greater complexity and independence. Over time, this role may expand to support additional programs and products across the broader Compliance Product Line. You should be ready to learn from senior team members, take direction effectively, and demonstrate initiative in building your skills within a compliance\\-driven, multi\\-system enterprise environment.
   

  

**What Will You Do In This Role**
* Develop, modify, and maintain MuleSoft integrations of moderate complexity between enterprise systems, following established architectural standards, design patterns, and technical guidance from Sr. Software Engineers and the Solution Architect.
* Write clean, well\\-documented, and testable Java backend code to support integration logic, data transformations, and system connectivity within the RPS integration landscape.
* Participate in design reviews, contributing input and seeking guidance when deviating from established patterns or encountering unfamiliar technical challenges.
* Execute unit testing, integration testing, and support system testing activities, ensuring code quality, reliability, and compliance with organizational standards.
* Support AWS Aurora RDS database activities under guidance, including executing data modification scripts, assisting with database monitoring, and escalating complex database issues to senior team members.
* Maintain comprehensive technical documentation, including code comments, integration specifications, and deployment guides, ensuring all artifacts are current and aligned with team standards.
* Follow DevOps practices (Git, CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, observability) to support build, deployment, and monitoring of integration solutions.
* Assist with incident investigation and resolution, troubleshooting integration issues and escalating complex problems to the Sr. Software Engineer or Solution Architect as appropriate.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional team members — including Business Analysts, Solution Architects, Delivery Managers, the Product Manager, and fellow developers — to ensure integration solutions align with requirements and technical standards.
* Participate in Agile ceremonies, contributing to sprint planning, daily stand\\-ups, sprint reviews, and retrospectives, and providing accurate estimates for assigned work items.
* Learn and apply emerging technologies, including AI/LLM capabilities, under the guidance of senior team members to enhance automation and integration solutions.
* Contribute to broader Compliance Product Line initiatives as the portfolio evolves, applying and developing integration development skills across additional compliance programs and products in partnership with the Ethics \\& Compliance Office.
* Work within a matrix organizational structure, reporting to both the functional manager and collaborating with the Product manager. Participate in product planning, execution, and delivery, ensuring alignment with both functional and product goals.


**What Should You Have**
**Primary Skills \\- Mulesoft Integration, Java Backend, Devops CI/CD
   

  

 Seccondary Skills \\-AI \\- LLM**
 Must Have
   

  

* Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
* 3\\+ years of enterprise software development experience, with hands\\-on experience in MuleSoft integration development and Java backend development.
* Familiarity with AWS cloud services, including exposure to or foundational experience with Amazon Aurora RDS (e.g., executing queries, data modification scripts, basic monitoring).
* Solid foundational skills in building and modifying integrations within established architectural standards and design patterns, with strong attention to code quality and reliability.
* Experience with DevOps practices (Git, CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, observability) and an understanding of build and deployment processes.
* Hands\\-on experience with software testing practices, including unit testing, integration testing, and supporting system testing activities.
* Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies and experience participating in Agile ceremonies and providing work estimates.
* Foundational understanding of the full software development lifecycle (SDLC) and experience contributing to multiple SDLC phases (design, development, testing, deployment, support).
* Good troubleshooting and problem\\-solving skills, with the ability to diagnose moderately complex issues and escalate appropriately.
* Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively within a cross\\-functional team and take direction from senior team members.
* High degree of initiative, curiosity, and adaptability, with a desire to grow into increasing levels of technical complexity and independence.


 Nice\\-to\\-Have / Beneficial
   

  

* Exposure to or interest in AI/LLM technologies and their application in integration or automation scenarios.
* Familiarity with ServiceNow.
* MuleSoft certification.


 Our technology teams operate as business partners, proposing ideas and innovative solutions that enable new organizational capabilities. We collaborate internationally to deliver services and solutions that help everyone be more productive and enable innovation.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 We are known as Merck \\& Co., Inc., Rahway, New Jersey, USA in the United States and Canada and MSD everywhere else. For more than a century, we have been bringing forward medicines and vaccines for many of the world's most challenging diseases. Today, our company continues to be at the forefront of research to deliver innovative health solutions and advance the prevention and treatment of diseases that threaten people and animals around the world.
   

  

**What We Look For**
 Imagine getting up in the morning for a job as important as helping to save and improve lives around the world. Here, you have that opportunity. You can put your empathy, creativity, digital mastery, or scientific genius to work in collaboration with a diverse group of colleagues who pursue and bring hope to countless people who are battling some of the most challenging diseases of our time. Our team is constantly evolving, so if you are among the intellectually curious, join us—and start making your impact today.

 Animal Vaccination, Computer Science, Data Engineering, Data Visualization, Design Applications, DevOps, Digital Technology, Digital Transformation, Emerging Technologies, Information Technology Operations, Infrastructure As Code (IaC), Integration Testing, Product Planning, Software Configurations, Software Development, Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), Solution Architecture, Sprint Planning, System Designs, System Integration, Technical Writing Documentation, Testing

**Role Overview**
 As a Sr. Specialist, Software Engineering within the Enterprise IT Legal, Compliance \\& Security Value Team, you will support the Compliance Product Line, delivering technology solutions for the Ethics \\& Compliance Office (ECO). In this role, you will serve as a technical leader, initially focusing on the enterprise\\-wide Restricted Party Screening (RPS) program. You will be responsible for architecting, developing, and supporting complex integrations across the enterprise landscape, owning the end\\-to\\-end software development lifecycle (SDLC) for integration projects. This role demands deep expertise in MuleSoft, strong Java backend skills, hands\\-on experience with AWS services including Amazon Aurora RDS, and the ability to drive technical decisions that ensure scalability, reliability, and compliance. You will engage directly with stakeholders, present solutions, and manage technical expectations while collaborating closely with Solution Architects, Business Analysts, Delivery Managers, and the Technical Product Manager. You will also mentor junior developers and contribute to team knowledge sharing. Over time, this role may expand to support additional programs and products across the broader Compliance Product Line. You should be ready to lead technically with a high degree of ownership, demonstrate flexibility in collaborating across time zones, and bring a deep personal investment in the success of the solutions you build.
   

  

**What Will You Do In This Role**
* Architect, design, and implement advanced integrations between enterprise systems using MuleSoft, ensuring scalability, reliability, and compliance for the RPS program.
* Lead and manage all phases of the SDLC for integration projects, including requirements gathering, design, development, testing, deployment, and support.
* Serve as a technical expert, communicating complex integration concepts, presenting solutions to stakeholders, and managing technical expectations across business and IT audiences.
* Apply strong Java backend expertise to build robust, high\\-performance integration logic and troubleshoot complex issues across the RPS integration landscape.
* Manage and support AWS Aurora RDS databases supporting the RPS integration landscape, including database configuration, monitoring, performance tuning, and executing data modification scripts as needed.
* Integrate AI/LLM technologies to enhance automation, data processing, and intelligent decision\\-making within integration flows.
* Proactively identify opportunities for innovation and optimization, including developing tools and mock services to enable internal performance testing, integration testing, and solution robustness.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams — including Solution Architects, Business Analysts, Delivery Managers, Product Managers, and application integration teams — to align integration solutions with business goals and technical standards.
* Maintain comprehensive technical documentation and ensure best practices in code quality, security, and compliance.
* Mentor junior developers and contribute to team knowledge sharing, fostering technical growth and best practice adoption within the delivery team.
* Support incident investigation and resolution, leveraging insights from support activities to identify and propose improvements and optimizations to the RPS solution.
* Demonstrate extraordinary flexibility in collaborating with colleagues and stakeholders across time zones to ensure seamless delivery and alignment.
* Contribute to broader Compliance Product Line initiatives as the portfolio evolves, applying integration development expertise to additional compliance programs and products in partnership with the Ethics \\& Compliance Office.
* Work within a matrix organizational structure, reporting to both the functional manager and collaborating with the Product Manager. Participate in product planning, execution, and delivery, ensuring alignment with both functional and product goals.


**What Should You Have**
**Primary Skills \\- Mulesoft Integration, Java Backend, Devops CI/CD
   

  

 Seccondary Skills \\-AI \\- LLM**
 Must Have
   

  

* Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
* 7\\+ years of enterprise software development experience, with at least 4\\+ years of hands\\-on MuleSoft integration development, strong Java backend expertise, and hands\\-on experience with AWS services, including Amazon Aurora RDS.
* Hands\\-on experience with the full SDLC, Agile/Scrum methodologies, and DevOps practices (Git, CI/CD, infrastructure as code, observability).
* Experience with AWS cloud services, including managing and supporting Amazon Aurora RDS databases (e.g., database configuration, monitoring, performance tuning, and data modification scripts).
* Ability to architect and develop innovative tools and utilities (e.g., mock services, test data generators) on own initiative to support testing, performance validation, and solution robustness.
* Demonstrated communication skills, including technical presentations, stakeholder management, and solution advocacy.
* Excellent troubleshooting, problem\\-solving, and documentation skills, with a focus on technical excellence and compliance.
* High degree of initiative, ownership, adaptability, self\\-sufficiency, and personal investment in solution success.
* Flexibility and willingness to collaborate across time zones in a globally distributed team.


 Nice\\-to\\-Have / Beneficial
   

  

* Master's degree in a related field.
* Proven track record of delivering complex, large\\-scale integration projects in regulated environments (pharmaceutical, life sciences, compliance, or similar).
* Experience implementing or integrating AI/LLM technologies in integration or automation scenarios.
* Experience mentoring junior developers and contributing to team knowledge sharing and technical growth.
* Familiarity with ServiceNow.
* MuleSoft certification is highly desirable.
* Knowledge of GRC (Governance, Risk, and Compliance) principles and enterprise risk management.
